faqs.question: What are the courses offered at MIET Engineering College?
faqs.answer: MIET Engineering College offers AICTE-approved courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in affiliation with Anna University, Chennai. The college offers a four-year BE/ BTech programme at UG and two-year each ME and MBA programmes at the PG levels. Admission to MIET courses is both merit and entrance-based. Aspirants can fill out the enquiry from the college's website for more details.

college_info.intro:
MIET Engineering College offers a host of courses in the Engineering fields. These include popular choices in the Bachelor of Engineering (BE) stream. BE Civil Engineering, BE Electrical Engineering, BE Computer Science & Engineering are some of the sought-after courses. Also among student choices are the BTech programs like BTech in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science and BTech Information Technology.
Additionally, MIET Engineering College offers a plethora of PG programs in Master of Engineering (ME). Students looking to go further in their academics can choose from among the various Research courses at MIET Engineering College, with specializations like Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, English, etc. Also highly popular among students are the range of Management courses at MIET College of Engineering: from MBA to PhD in Management.

placements.overview:
The 2025 placements data for MIET Engineering College is currently not available and will be updated here as soon as published by the institute.

As per the 2024 placement report at MIET Engineering College, the highest salary offered was recorded at INR 18 LPA. The average salary, on the other hand, was INR 4.05 LPA. A total number of 47 companies visited the campus during the recruitment drive, and 296 students were placed from the institute. These combined figures are spread across the various departments like Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science, Management Studies etc.

admission_overview.college_name: MIET Engineering College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: MIET Trichy admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The college offers admission to its flagship programme i.e. BE/ BTech based on their qualifying exam scores. BTech aspirants have to participate in TNEA Counselling for admission. Besides,MIET Trichyoffers courses such as MBA and ME at the PG level. Admission to PG courses is based on national or state-level entrance exam scores. The college also offers a PhD at MIET in various specialisations. Candidates can reach out to the college via the enquiry form available on the college's website.

MIET offers AICTE-approved courses in affiliation withAnna University, Chennai. Aspirants must pass theGATE/CEETA PGfor ME andTANCETfor MBA. Candidates should also fulfil the eligibility requirements for their preferred course to get admission in the institute. Below are theMIET Trichy coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Download:MIET Trichy Brochure

MIT Trichy admission 2025are currently open. Aspirants, after qualifying any of the accepted entrance test, can participate in the admission process of the college. Candidates must fulfil both the eligibility and selection criteria for admission. The college offers admission under both the Government and Management Quota. Aspirants seeking under Management Quota muct contact the college for detailed information. Below are the steps to get a seat in the college:
Step 1: MIT Trichy Application Process 2025

Aspirants in case of any query can raise their concern on the college's website. Candidates are required to first apply and appear for any of the accepted entrance tests. Once the candidates pass the entrance exam, they have to participate in the counselling rounds. Aspirants have to apply for TNEA after completing Class 12 for BE/ BTech.
Step 2: Selection

Candidates are selected based on their TNEA rank for BE/ BTech. For MBA and ME courses, aspirants have to pass TANCET and CEETA PG/ GATE, respectively. Aspirants with a valid score in these entrance test are offered a seat through counselling.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

Aspirants are offered seat in BE/ BTech viaTNEA Counselling.For MBA and ME, aspirants are alloted seat in MIET viaTANCETandCEETA PG Counselling. For GATE-qualified candidates, a single-window counselling process will be conducted through the Common Engineering Admission Procedure (CEAP). Once the seat is alloted to the aspirant, he or she are required to report at the campus for MIET for document verification. Candidates also need to pay theMIET Trichy feeto confirm their seat.

The college offers BE in various specialisations such as Biomedical, Civil,Computer Science, Electronics & Communication,Electrical & ElectronicsandMechanical Engineering. Besides, BTech is available inArtificial Intelligence & Data Scienceand Information Technology at MIET. Besides, the college also offers lateral entry to BE/ BTech programmes.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at MIET Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed Higher Secondary Examination prescribed by the Government of Tamil Nadu or any examination of any other University or authority accepted by the Syndicate of University as equivalent thereto with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for BC /BCM /MBC /DNC /SC /SCA /ST) are eligible to apply for BE/ BTech at MIET Engineering College.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at MIET Engineering College?
faqs.answer: MIET Engineering College offers a four-year BE/ BTech courses at the UG level. Candidates who have passed the higher secondary examination can apply for the course. BTech is available in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science and Information Technology at MIET. Below are the BE specialisations offered at MIET:BiomedicalCivilComputer ScienceElectronics & CommunicationElectrical & ElectronicsMechanical Engineering

faqs.question: Does MIET Engineering College offer lateral entry to BTech course?
faqs.answer: Yes, MIET Engineering College offers lateral entry to BE/ BTech course. Candidates who have completed Diploma in Engineering/ Technology awarded by the Directorate of Technical Education, Tamil Nadu or its equivalent are eligible to apply for lateral entry. Besides, aspirants with a degree in BSc with Mathematics are also eligible to apply.

courses_data.name: MIET Trichy MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: MIET Engineering College offers a two-year MBA programme at the PG level. The course is spread across four semesters. During the course, students are required to undergo an internship for a period of four weeks (2 credits) during the summer vacation under a faculty mentor assigned by the Head of the Department. Admission to the MBA programme is based on the TANCET score of the aspirants.

faqs.question: What is the cutoff for MBA at MIET Engineering College?
faqs.answer: MIET Engineering College considers TANCET score for admission to MBA programme. Aspirants need to score equal or above the TANCET cutoff for admission. Below are the TANCET cutoff for MBA for past three-years:Section202220232024Overall654265046250

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at MIET Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for MIET Engineering College MBA programme. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for BC /BCM /MBC /DNC /SC /SCA /ST. Such aspirants only required a minimum of 45% aggregate in graduation to apply for MBA. Besides, aspirants must also have a valid TANCET score for MBA admission.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for MBA at MIET Engineering College?
faqs.answer: There are a total of 60 seats available in the MBA programme of MIET Engineering College. Aspirants are offered seats in MBA course based on the TANCET score of the aspirants. After passing TANCET, candidates need to participate in TANCET Counselling for seat allotment. Once selected, aspirants need to report at the college campus for document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: Is there Management Quota at MIET Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Yes, MIET Engineering College offers admission through both government and management quota. Admission via Management Quota are conducted as per the norms set by the Government of Tamil Nadu and the Consortium of Self-Financing Colleges. Candidates must have a pass with minimum average marks in related subjects, including vocational theory and practicals combined to apply for admission under the Management Quota.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MIET Engineering College?
faqs.answer: MIET Engineering College admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The college considers qualifying exam scores of the aspirants followed by TNEA rank for admission to BE/ BTech courses. Besides, the selection for MBA and ME courses is based on TANCET and GATE/ CEETA PG scores. Aspirants have to appear for respective entrance exam counselling for admission.

faqs.question: Can I join MIET Engineering College without TNEA?
faqs.answer: Candidates applying for BE/ BTech cannot get into MIET Engineering College without TNEA rank. Aspirants after completing Class 12 have to participate in the TNEA Counselling. The seats are alloted to aspirants based on their TNEA rank. Aspirants applying under the Management Quota do not require participate in TNEA. Such aspirants are offered direct admission.

faqs.question: Can I get MIET Engineering College through TANCET score?
faqs.answer: The answer to this question depends on the course applied by the candidate. In case of MBA, aspirants are offered admission based on their TANCET score. TANCET is an admission test conducted by Anna University once in a year. It is a state-level entrance exam conducted in offline mode for two hours. Talking about the TANCET score required for admission, The MIET TANCET cutoff for 2024 increased from 6542 in 2022,  6504 in 2023 to 6250 in 2024 indicates selective intake.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Our course infrastructure is good and well-maintained. Our college has high-tech labs, and the hostel facilities are also good. For hostel students, they provide good food and ensure full security. Our hostel has a large seminar hall, and the canteen offers good food.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Modern classrooms with smart boards, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Hostels are clean with good amenities, mess food is hygienic with decent variety, medical center is 24/7, and ample sports/games facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: The boys' hostel is average, and the mess is not bad. Girls' hostel is very best. The library has a 2.5 crore value of books and e-books. All labs have ACs and good personal computers. No medical facilities are available in my college.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college and my department have excellent infrastructure and facilities with available to latest labs and equipments with AC facilities and full-time Wi-Fi connections are required to gain extra knowledge by visiting the library. Our college hostel has the best infrastructure. They provide a lift for the student's comfort and a very quality of food is provided in mess and the canteen. They also conduct sports and games every week.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to study but not for enjoying the college days.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure is not bad. All the time, the Wi-Fi will be on, there is no problem with that. Our labs are good and neat. It has fans, light, projector, etc. Our classrooms are always neat and clean. Library has been silent and the best place to gather about our course. I am not a hosteller so I don't know about that but canteen is not bad. Food and snacks are always available. Medical facilities are good in our college. Sports and games are only held on sports days.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available like Wi-Fi, labs, and library. Hostel is very good. Quality and availability of food are very nice. Emergency medical facilities are there and it is good. They will support sports and games and also available many sports activities at my college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and knowledge development.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection is always available. Library has the excellent maintenance for the book section, and its easy to take the books from the library. Hostel facility is so good, and food is very delicious and healthy for maintenance. The canteen is so perfect.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good and friendly. Infrastructure is good. Hostel food quality is nice and important for sports and games. The facilities in hostel and quality of food in mess and canteen are good. The facilities and infrastructure are very good and efficient. Medical facilities are good. AC is available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. High facilities are available in my course. Classrooms are very comfortable with smart class technology. Wi-Fi is good. Labs are very maintained and library is very good. Hostel is very good with all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Well-equipped campus with strong placements.
reviews.review_text: It has newly equipped wireless communication laboratory. The facilities and infrastructure for my course and department are well-equipped and maintained. The classrooms are spacious and have modern teaching aids like projects and smart boards. The department has all the accessories.

reviews.review_heading: Balanced campus life with skilled faculty members, solid infrastructure and excellent placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus offers steady Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are decent with clean rooms, 24X7 water, and average-quality food in the mess. Sports courts, a health center, a gym, and recreational zones are also available, making student life balanced.

reviews.review_heading: Good enough for the students who are trying to study in a friendly environment.
reviews.review_text: The college offers well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a resourceful library. Hostels are better with basic amenities, good security, and average food. Sports spaces support a comfortable and productive student life. I recommend the hostel at 45%. That's all.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and faculty but placement support needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: The food in the hostel is hygienic and offers a decent variety, with both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options. Hostel rooms are clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi is available 24/7 and there are good study areas, medical facilities and indoor sports options. The classrooms are spacious, with projectors and labs that are well-equipped. The library is well-stocked and open during extended hours.

reviews.review_heading: M. I. E. T. Engineering has good infrastructure. Our surroundings have a green appearance.
reviews.review_text: We have a good and healthy environment. Our lab has a perfect network connection, and our staff explains the program clearly and understandably. The classroom is equipped with a nice board, fans, lights, and smart screens. We have a pleasant surroundings around our classroom.

reviews.review_heading: This college is absolutely good enough for the students who want friendly nature.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is quite average. The food provided in the hostel is good. The facilities provided by the management for the hostel are worth the money. The college offers well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a resourceful library, and its hostels are better with good amenities.

course_faqs.question: Is BCom available in Maharaja Agrasen University?

admission_overview.college_name: Maharaja Agrasen University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Process, Date

paragraphs: Maharaja Agrasen Universityadmission 2025is conducted online. Candidates seeking admission to any of the programmes offered by the University must satisfy the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective programmes. Eligible students need to register themselves online for admission through the official website of the University. 25% seats are filled by the bona fide candidates of Himachal Pradesh, while the remaining 75% seats are filled by the candidates of India. It offers more than 250coursesat UG, PG, diploma, PG diploma, certificate and doctoral level across multiple fields such as Applied Sciences, Law, Business & Management Studies, Commerce, Engineering and Pharmacy.

For Maharaja Agrasen University admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to Maharaja Agrasen University course admissions 2025:

Maharaja Agrasen University admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process around KUD admissions 2025:
Step 1: Maharaja Agrasen University Application Process 2025

Maharaja Agrasen University admission process 2025 starts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at MAU. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the PG courses at Maharaja Agrasen University is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams such as CAT, MAT or merit for the selection of respective courses. Furthermore, the university offers UG courses through its affiliated colleges. Admissions to UG courses are based on merit scores obtained in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seat.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Maharaja Agrasen University?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot join Maharaja Agrasen University directly. Admission to this University are entrance based.You should qualify any of the exams like CAT/CMAT/MAT/HPCET/XAT/GMAT/ATMA to make yourself eligible for selection for MBA programmes offered by the university. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Go for it. Better college.

content.Placements: In our batch, around 60% of students were placed successfully through campus recruitment drives. Highest package offered was 8 LPA, while the lowest stood at 4 LPA, with an average package in between. Top recruiters included Tata, Infosys, and several other reputed companies. A good number of students also secured internships in well-known organizations, gaining industry exposure and hands-on experience. Roles offered mainly included positions in design, development, operations, and technical support, helping students build a strong career foundation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college course is much better than other courses.

content.Placements: 50% of students get placed in this course. The highest package in our course is 6 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The top roles offered in this course are many like IT fields. The percentage of students who get internships in our course is 90% in private companies.
content.Infrastructure: It feels better to learn and fresh to leave the college to learn something which will be useful in this course. The hostel is good to stay in without any problems. It serves good food. We can live in the hostel without any disturbance or any irrelevance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great curriculum and practical learning, with good infrastructure and room for improvement.

content.Placements: In our batch at SGBIT 60 to 70 percent students got placed. The highest package offered is 8.5 LPA. The lowest salary is around 3.9 LPA. The average salary is 4.4 LPA. Top recruiters included Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Mindtree and IBM. 70 percent students secured internships, with roles like AI architect, data scientist and ML engineer. The placement cell actively coordinated campus and pool drives to enhance industry readiness.
content.Infrastructure: The AI and data science department at SG Balekundri Institute of Technology has excellent labs with the latest software and high-speed Wi-Fi. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors and smart boards. The library is well-stocked with books and online resources. Hostel facilities are good, with clean rooms and 24X7 security. The mess food is decent. The canteen offers more variety. Sports facilities include a basketball court and indoor games. Medical facilities are available with a clinic on campus, ensuring students' well-being.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college with no regrets after taking admission. The infrastructure is very good.

content.Placements: The percentage of placement in my batch was 30 percent but in other batches like EC and CSE it was more than 70 percent. In my batch everyone had to do an internship it was mandatory and students had to decide where to do it. I did my internship at AEC company. One girl named Priyadarshni was selected by Prism RMC company, and her package was 3.2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: For my course, everything was available. There were labs for every subject, and the library and books were also available. Wi-Fi was free for online study. We had hostels for both girls and boys, and there was also Wi-Fi and a study room. The food in the hostel was good, they made a different menu every day in the hostel mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Lasting fun during college, which will always be remembered.

content.Placements: Very few, 20 to 25, that’s it, in the previous year where students were placed. The highest package offered was 9 Lacs, and the minimum package was 2 Lacs. Only 5 percent of students were placed in the previous year. Many had taken internships from the college itself, which were paid internships of 2k.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel food is not up to mark. The remaining facilities, like hostel rooms and all, are cleaned regularly. Washrooms and all are a little not up to the mark. Labs, classes, and libraries are all available at the college itself. The study table is provided in the hostel room, that’s it.

review_summary.college_name: SRMS CETR Bareilly Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college provides you with every opportunity to grow; it is you who take it & grow your own skill

content.Placements: My batch is 2020, and my course is B. Teaching in the CSE domain. Every year, almost 80–90 percent of students are placed here. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Justpay, and many more. Every year, almost 90 percent of students get internships in our course, and the companies include TCS, Wipro, and more. The roles offered in our course are software development, full-stack development, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are quite good. The labs, classroom, library, and Wi-Fi are well-maintained. The quality of facilities provided in our hostel is also good; the food available here is quite good, and the medical and sports facilities available here are also fine.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: In this college, 95 percent of students are placed per year. The highest package is 19 Lacs per annum, and the lowest package is 6 Lacs per annum. The top recruiting companies for CSE are TCS, Decathlon, Hike, and Reliance, etc. 75 percent of students got internships from the CSE course.
content.Infrastructure: The facility of the college is very good, and the infrastructure is excellent, like Wi-Fi campus. There are five computer labs, and the classrooms are good. The library facility is available from 8:00 am to 12:00 am. In the hostel, the food quality is good, and medical facilities are available 24 hours.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with college faculty and facilities.

content.Placements: 60% of the students were placed at my college. The highest placement package was 19 LPA, and the lowest placement package was 3 LPA, with an average of 5–6 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Infosys, Wipro, and TCS. Approximately 20% of students get internships from my course, and they get internships in CETPA. The top roles are software developer and software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Yes, the teachers are helpful and well-qualified. Most teachers have qualified doctorates. The teaching quality was good. Yes, this course curriculum is relevant, and it makes the students industry-ready. The difficulty of the semester exams is average, and the pass percentage is 40%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty members and infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 65% of students are placed. The highest package is 19 LPA, the lowest is 3.5 LPA, and the average package is 6 to 7 LPA. Companies like Infosys, TCS, and Wipro offer placements. About 65% of students in our course are placed in Wipro, Infosys, TCS, and others. It offers many roles like software developer, data analyst, app developer, and so on.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are up to par, and the infrastructure is good enough. Wi-Fi is available, different labs are conducted as per the schedule given by the faculty members, and the library has enough books required for this course. In the hostel, the food quality is good, and there is also a canteen. A dispensary is also available, and many sports like volleyball, table tennis, pool, basketball, carrom, and chess are played regularly, but I mostly play carrom and chess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and facilities.

content.Placements: 50 percent of students were placed. The highest salary offered was 18 LPA, with an average of 4-5 LPA and a minimum of 3 LPA. Companies like TCS, HCL, Infosys, and more were involved in placements. About 70 percent of students get internships in companies like Wipro, TCS, Amazon, etc. Roles such as Software Engineer, Cloud Developer, Web Developer, etc. are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, CCTV, Smartboards, computer labs, library, classrooms, playground, park, hostel, canteen, mess, ladies' washrooms, gents' washrooms, electrical lab, DE lab, physics lab, chemistry lab, etc., are available. Hostel facilities are good, and all other facilities like sports, food, and staff are good.

paragraphs: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering, Technology and Research admission 2025is currently open. The college offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, BCA and BHMCT courses at the UG level. To get admission to Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering, Technology and Research, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application process at Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering, Technology and Research is conducted both online/offline. The college is affiliated withAKTU. Read the following article to know more aboutSRMSCETR course admission2025.

The mode of study for various courses is full-time. To enrol for various course admissions, candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the college. For BTech course, 85% of seats in all the branches are allocated to the merit list of JEE Main. For the rest of the 15% seats, all the branches are allocated based on the merit of Class 12 and brief object assessment. Read on to know more aboutSRMS CETRcourse admissions2025.

Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology and Research courses' admissions are based on the entrance exam as per respective courses. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularShri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology and Research courses:

Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering, Technology and Research's admission process includes entrance exam scores for various courses. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at SRMSCETR is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: SRMS CETR Bareilly Application Process 2025

Aspirants fulfilling the course-specific eligibility criteria can visit the college's official website (https://myportal.srms.ac.in/onlineregistration) to apply. All the details in the application form should be filled out carefully. Candidates can also apply offline for course admission.
STEP 2: Shortlisting of Students
The institute considers entrance exam scores, i.e., JEE Main, for admission to the BTech programme. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for the final selection.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theShri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering, Technology and Research feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides you with every opportunity to grow; it is you who take it & grow your own skill
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are quite good. The labs, classroom, library, and Wi-Fi are well-maintained. The quality of facilities provided in our hostel is also good; the food available here is quite good, and the medical and sports facilities available here are also fine.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facility of the college is very good, and the infrastructure is excellent, like Wi-Fi campus. There are five computer labs, and the classrooms are good. The library facility is available from 8:00 am to 12:00 am. In the hostel, the food quality is good, and medical facilities are available 24 hours.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with college faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Yes, the teachers are helpful and well-qualified. Most teachers have qualified doctorates. The teaching quality was good. Yes, this course curriculum is relevant, and it makes the students industry-ready. The difficulty of the semester exams is average, and the pass percentage is 40%.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are up to par, and the infrastructure is good enough. Wi-Fi is available, different labs are conducted as per the schedule given by the faculty members, and the library has enough books required for this course. In the hostel, the food quality is good, and there is also a canteen. A dispensary is also available, and many sports like volleyball, table tennis, pool, basketball, carrom, and chess are played regularly, but I mostly play carrom and chess.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, CCTV, Smartboards, computer labs, library, classrooms, playground, park, hostel, canteen, mess, ladies' washrooms, gents' washrooms, electrical lab, DE lab, physics lab, chemistry lab, etc., are available. Hostel facilities are good, and all other facilities like sports, food, and staff are good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are up to the mark, and the infrastructure is also good enough. Wi-Fi is available, different labs are conducted as per the schedule given by the faculty members, and the library is sufficient to get all the required books for this course. In the hostel, food quality is good, and there is also a canteen. A dispensary is also available, and many sports like basketball and volleyball are played regularly, but we can play whatever we want.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are pretty good, whether it's Wi-Fi, labs, or others. Speaking of hostel facilities, the quality of food provided through the canteen and mess is much better, and other facilities like sports and medical are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Ram Murti Smarak College.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is utmost good in all over Bareilly region includes good building, well-furnished rooms, Wi-Fi, delicious food, good workers. Ventilated classrooms and well-maintained labs where students can practice their practical knowledge. Annual sports, cultural, technical fests are organized.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied from this college and their faculty members and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the course department are well developed. Wi-Fi facilities are also available on the college campus. And labs have enough computers, and all labs are air-conditioned. There is a big library and enough course-related books. The quality of the food is good and the mess is cleaned up all the time. Free medical facilities are provided for the student, and sports items are also available. And there is a huge field for all outdoor and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of studying environment and good placement.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the course department are good. There is Wi-Fi in the college, the labs have enough computer systems, and all labs have air conditioning. There is a big library and enough course-related books. The quality of the hostel food is good and the mess is cleaned all the time. There are medical facilities on the campus and sports are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good infrastructure, and good placement in 2021.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good their is a lift system on the college campus, free Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, the labs have the latest software, the labs have full air conditioning, and the library has too many new and old books.

reviews.review_heading: 100% placement support, good infrastructure and awesome facilities.
reviews.review_text: This college is too much good in terms of infrastructure compared to another college in Bareilly. High-speed Wi-Fi facility for students there is a total of 6 different computer Science labs and electrical and 5 electronics labs. Also having clean classrooms and washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good in academics.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good. The construction was massive, well-designed, and planned. All facilities and infrastructure of our college were excellent like the library, equipment in labs, sports ground, and a huge parking area.

reviews.review_heading: A college where values are taught and make you think out of the box.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. All the facilities are available. An indoor multipurpose hall is one of the best facilities in the town and is attractive. Other than that, the academic block has greenery all around. It gives a good environment to study. A decent canteen and beautiful walking area are just an addon.

reviews.review_heading: A great college with strict rules but great faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-equipped labs, and their maintenance is done on a regular basis. All the computers which are not working are replaced with new ones. There is also a ground to play various games like cricket, football etc. Overall, the college has a good infrastructure.

admission_process.title: Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes admission 2025is a blend of entrance and merit-based. Entrance exam scores may be taken into consideration for certain courses/ cases. Students can pursue a variety of programmes in the fields of Engineering, Technology, Nursing, Agriculture, and more. These programmes are offered at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. Also known asABGI, the institute provides its programmes via its colleges, such as the College of Pharmacy, College of Nursing, College of Engineering, etc. The admission process of the institution is carried out in offline mode generally. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the admission process, courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and other information for Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes.

Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes, Pathankot admission criteriais a blend of merit and entrance depending on the course selected by the candidates. Students seeking to get into any of the offered courses are required to satisfy the eligibility requirements as specified by the concerned authority. The selection criteria may vary depending on the specialisation. The courses are offered in full-time mode. Aspirants can take a look at the following table to know about the general eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popularABGI Pathankot courses:

The admission procedure for Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes includes several steps from registration, selection, and counselling (if applicable), and ends with admission confirmation. Aspirants need to ensure that they satisfy the criteria set by the college before applying online. Interested students can follow the steps listed below to complete theABGI admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested students can visit the official website of the institute to fill out the Admission Enquiry Form. Someone from the institute will reach out to the prospective candidate to help carry out the remaining process.
Step 2: Selection Process

The selection procedure may vary depending on the programme and specialisations. Students are shortlisted based on merit in the last qualifying exam. However, the institute may accept scores obtained in the relevant entrance exams. Additionally, students may have to participate in counselling for seat allotment.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
For final admission, selected students need to pay theABGI admission fees.

description: What's new at Malwa Institute of Technology cutoff 2023? JEE Main 2024 registration is ongoing for the academic year 2024-25. Candidates seeking admission to Malwa Institute of Technology must register online. JEE Main exam 2024 is scheduled to be held on Jan 24, 2023 to Feb 01, 2023. Following the previous year's schedule, Malwa Institute of Technology JEE Main cutoff 2024 will start releasing the round-wise cutoff lists tentatively in the month of Jan.

Malwa Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 1337932 and 1461575 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 1337932, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 1264681.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 1337932.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

Considering the Malwa Institute of Technology B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General HS category students were B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and B.Tech. in Information Technology, with last-round closing ranks of 1337932, 1400993, and 1422960, respectively.

Malwa Institute of Technology MPPET cutoff 2024 has been announced. Based on the candidates' MPPET scores, the cutoffs are published and based on the cutoffs, the students were shortlisted for admission to Diploma courses. The Malwa Institute of Technology Round 1 cutoff 2024 has been released across various specialisations among which Diploma in Mechanical Engineering was the most competitive course, followed by Diploma in Civil Engineering. reviews.review_heading: All about my college and its features.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure is top-notch. If you're looking for a college that offers a great balance of academics, extracurricular activities

reviews.review_heading: My college review with all problems I have faced.
reviews.review_text: We have old computers in our labs and only one lab has the latest computers, half of the computers are not working, which means features do not work. Wi-Fi is not working. Sports facilities are not good and canteen is average.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in this college with really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are available. Library is provided in the college having all the types of books for the students. The best thing in the library is that you can get the books issued and return them in 15 days, otherwise, charges are added in your account. Infrastructure is very nice.

reviews.review_heading: The placement and faculty of the college were good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course was good. The college had good-quality facilities for our department. The labs of the college had all the necessary facilities. Wi-Fi, library, hostel, canteen, etc. Facilities were given to the students. The food in our hostel mess was good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Indore; teachers are very friendly.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good. Hostel is not available. Bus facility is available, free of cost. Library is available. Wi-Fi is available only for the teachers, and in labs. Small temple of goddess Saraswati is also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college with teachers, facilities, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available at our college. Wi-Fi is available. Our lab facilities are good. Our classrooms are huge, very clean, and well-equipped. The library is too good. There are a lot of books for every course. The food served is very delicious in the canteen. Our college has a sports hub, so there are good facilities for sports and games. There is no hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its infrastructure but the education is average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Our college does not provide hostels so we have to stay in rented houses.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely an average college because of placements.
reviews.review_text: The sitting arrangement of classes are good, maxim number of student can interact with blackboard, the labs are good availability of aperetus are fulfilled for all students. The library has enough books for students and has vary well sitting arrangement.

reviews.review_heading: This college is amazing, it's good to study in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and environment are the best of this college and I feel so blessed to pursue this course at this college. The canteen is also good, and the faculty is best at teaching. They are overall good in everything, and there is an NCC, teachers are very helpful.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, and smart classrooms are available in our college. A huge library is also available for students. Our campus is very beautiful. Sports and other curriculum activities are provided by the college for students.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with its teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college is very good. The laboratory is average. Wi-Fi facility is not publically available for students. Our classrooms are average. The library is good. Hostel facilities are not available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: My college look wise is amazing but placement are not good, otherwise all good.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are provided in my college like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and library. My college is the center in sports. Best players in my college have cracked state level and national level. NCC (National Cadet Crops) are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because the college only focuses on marketing.
reviews.review_text: There are no facilities in hostel. Library is awesome and it has all the books. Infrastructure wise, the college is brilliant. It has a large campus, canteen, playground but canteen food is not great. Events always happen in the college and many types of fests also. There is no Wi-Fi. Labs are good including  classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average. There are three floors in a building with a garden in between. We have four computer laboratories on campus. Wi-Fi is not available. A small canteen is available. There is also a library and the sitting area is also good. Classrooms are big enough for 150 students and have a smart board. Hostel is not provided in the college. Students can go to private hostels.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Indore for B.Com.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for this course are very good. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library are available. Wi-Fi speed is very good. The quality of hostel facilities is very good, and the quality of food available in the mess is very good.

During the VVP College BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 13084 and 39831 for the General HS category students. The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.E. in Civil Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 13084 for the general HS quota.

reviews.review_text: My college has a big campus. College provides all facilities like lab, Wi-Fi, classroom, projector, etc. The quality of food available in our canteen is good and medical facility is also available. All types of sports and games are provided by our college, indoor and outdoor.

reviews.review_heading: Review of vvp engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not provide hostel facility. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There is a huge library with several books available. PGs have rented rooms available nearby our campus. Classrooms are spacious. Computer lab is very good. Perfect infrastructure with almost all the facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all the facilities. The hostel facility is not available in our college. The hostel is situated within 2- 3 kilometers away from the college. They provide medical facilities. We play cricket, passing ball, shooting ball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of VVP Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not provide hostel facilities. PGs and rented rooms are available nearby our campus. Classrooms are spacious. Computer laboratory is very good. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There is a huge library and several books are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but placement-wise and co-curricular activity-wise, it is somewhere lagging.
reviews.review_text: A perfect infrastructure with almost all facilities and hygiene is provided, and good reviews are what I would like to give about college infrastructure and facilities. Yes, they are well ventilated, and good facilities are provided as well. Yes, everything, including the canteen, is good.

reviews.review_heading: A college turning individuals into competent professionals with moral values.
reviews.review_text: Our department has big, airy classrooms, well-equipped computer labs, free internet service, library facilities, a big campus spread across 33 acres full of greenery, a big playground with sports equipment, and a big canteen with accommodation for around 1000–2000 students.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college for education and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure and facilities are there; there are facilities like wi-fi, labs, clean classrooms, and a library. You can find any book in our library, and if there is no book available, they provide the facility that we can request a particular book and it will be available.

reviews.review_heading: Great environment, huge campus, and well-experienced professors.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and overall college life are good for studying.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel facility available at our college. There is a canteen where we can buy foods and eat different types of foods like samosas, kachori, sandwiches, dosas, etc., and it is good. There are games for almost every sport, like badminton, chess, table tennis, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the teaching system.
reviews.review_text: The campus is beautiful and full of green space. Easy to relax and outdoor for sports. The sports field is quite large. Many clubs are also there in our college, like music, dance, art, management, etc. NCC is also at our college. The seminar room and auditorium are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Placement are nice but you also have to do self study.
reviews.review_text: It's pretty good. Environment is good. Opportunity for growth is also good. Library is nice, they have non- teach books also and there are some books in English . You will find all the technical books here. Canteen is not so good but not that much bad also.

paragraphs: RITEE Group of Institutes admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.RITEE Group of Institutesoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.Sc., B.Sc. (Post Basic), MCA and M.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 96,000 - 3,28,600. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 2 years - 3 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in RITEE Group of Institutes for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
RITEE Group of Institutes has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate Upper age limit is 40 years for UR category,  45 years for PWD who belongs to UR category of Chattisgarh,  43 years for SC/ST/OBC and Female category of Chattisgarh, and 45 years for PWD who belongs to SC/ST/OBC and female category of Chattisgarh as on 1st of July of academic year.B.E. / B.TechCandidate who has passed Diploma in Engineering/Architecture from a recognised board/university with 45% marks for UR category (40% marks for SC/ST/OBC and PWD category of Chattisgarh) can also apply for the course.
Candidate passing 10th/12th through distance learning/open school shall be eligible for admission.
Candidate passed Diploma programme through distance learning shall not be eligible to apply.
If the candidate has passed 10+2 examination, but failed in one or more compulsory subject than the candidate shall not be considered eligible for admission.

cut_off.college_name: RITEE Group of Institutes Cutoff 2025: Check CG PET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: RITEE College Raipur cutoff 2025 will be released soon for admission to the BE/BTech courses. In the meantime, aspirants seeking admission can check the sections below to view RITEE College Raipur cutoff 2024 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories to understand the cutoff trends. A few more updates are given below:

RITEE College Raipur CG PET cutoff 2025 has been released for the second round for candidates waiting to get admission to B.E. / B.Tech course. The cutoff list was released category-wise as opening-closing cutoff ranks. The cutoff ranks also varied on the basis of gender, as some reservations were made for Female category students.

CG PET cutoff 2025 is finally out for students seeking admission to various undergraduate engineering courses in the state of Chhattisgarh. RITEE College Raipur has also released the second round cutoff list for aspiring candidates, based on JEE Main scores and CG PET counselling. The minimum cutoff for admission to any branch was 2167, for candidates belonging to the General HS category. The maximum required cutoff rank is 3525 during Round 2 admission.

The Directorate of Technical Education (DTE) have announced the CG PET 2025 counselling dates online. CG PET 2025 seat allotment results are being announced separately for the different rounds of counselling. Allotment of seats will be done based on the candidate's obtained rank, preferences, category and seat availability. Candidates can check out the important CGPET 2025 datesc in the table below:

Below are the RITEE College Raipur CG PET consolidated PDFs for students interested in seeking admission to the college for B.E. / B.Tech course. Students can view or download the PDFs to view the round and year-wise cutoff lists.

In this section, candidates can check the cutoff of colleges and specialisations available for admission based on the CG PET latest round cutoff ranks. To do the comparison based on other parameters, such as location, category, etc., students can use the filter provided.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the campus. There are 5 computer labs and 3 cad labs. Classrooms are also good. There is a library, where all types of books are available. Hostel facilities are not too good. Mess food is not very good. Sports facilities are good. We have 2 playgrounds in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good. There is the main library and two bio labs. Our classes are huge. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The hostel facility at this college is not so good. There is no air conditioning. They do not provide for basic needs. The mess food is not good or hygienic. The canteen food is also not good. Medical facilities are not available. Sports and games facilities are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are very helpful. The college provides all facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is widely spread in 20 acres. We 3 playgrounds and one function ground. Wi-fi facility is provided in whole campus. We have one library in campus where all types of books are available. Hostel facilities are not so good. Living facilities are average but food facility is not so good. For sports students, this college is best. The college provides all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of RITEE Group of Institutes.
reviews.review_text: Our college has 2 acres of land, and the infrastructure is good. We have three playgrounds on campus. It has a library with several books. Our campus also has Wi-Fi access.

reviews.review_heading: I'm totally satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is quite better than other colleges. In campus, we have one central library, for CSE we have 3 labs and campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. Hostel facilities are not so good. Mess facilities are very bad. Canteen is good in campus. Sports and games facilities are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in the biotech department are the best. There is a lab for biotech students. Library is available on campus with all types of books. Campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are very big. Hostel facilities are not good. Its value for money is 3 out of 5 because the food served in mess is not good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Review of RITEE Group of Institutes.
reviews.review_text: Facilities for CSE students are good in this college. Hostel facilities are good. The mess food is average. Every type of sports facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: Know before taking admission.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities in this college is average. Boys hostel is inside the campus and girls hostel is located nearby the campus. In hostel Wi-Fi facility is available. AC facility is not available. Food facilities are good in mess. Food is hygienic and fresh.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college with a great understanding between faculty and students. The crowd is good.
reviews.review_text: The quality of everything is pretty decent and manageable. The facilities and infrastructure are really good Wi-Fi works just fine. Labs are fully equipped and good. Classrooms and washrooms are neat and clean. Hostel facilities are good too. The food is decent.

reviews.review_heading: In short, college is good and have good infrastructural looks and also so clean.
reviews.review_text:
1. lab facility stable and speed Wi-Fi In campus area, clean classrooms, have larger class room with digital class board and standard baord also college have standard and larger liblary with Lots of books. 
2. Hostels and separated for girls and boys within 1 km from college. Good food availability in canteen and mess also.

reviews.review_heading: College looks good, faculty are well qualified, have a large infrastructure .
reviews.review_text:
1. Wi-Fi, labs, library for all students in the campus. 
2. Hostel are separated for boys and girls and looks good
3. Food available in the hostels are good in taste but sometimes it is weird and late to serve 
4. Have a saprate canteen for student and teacher.

reviews.review_heading: It has very good infrastructure and looks very beautiful from inside and outside.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge. It has a great library. Wi-Fi is open for everyone with a speed of 1 mbps. The campus has a clean and good environment for study. It has separate hostels for both girls and boys in just 200m from campus. Good food is available in the mess and canteen. The college conducts Rito fest, that includes sports like cricket, volleyball, football, and dance.

reviews.review_heading: Review of RITEE Group of Institutes.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is a bit good and is well maintained, but it can be more advanced as per their fees for students. They keep it clean and maintain it very well which attracts people towards it, and it got a plus point of the environment around the campus which is very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am not really satisfied with my studies. However, college life is good here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average here. Computer labs are available, but their situation is not very good. Classrooms are also average, but the signal strength of Wi-Fi is good. The library is good with a facility of E-library. Hostel facilities are fine, and the mess changes money regularly as per the request of students. Sports and games are fine. Indoor games are also available such as table tennis, carrom and chess. There are outdoor sports such as basketball, football, cricket, handball, kho-kho, etc.

reviews.review_heading: RITEE is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: There are nice facilities and infrastructure in this course. All the facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, etc., are available. There is a nice quality hostel, and the food served in the mess is very good in quality. Medical facilities are excellent, and sports and games facilities are also excellent.
